title: Using vision with the robot
description:
Using vision with the robot

Using vision with the robot

Before you can use results from a vision sequence to guide the robot, you need to calibrate the camera that is used by the sequence.  See Calibration for details.

If you attempt to get a result from a sequence object that requires calibration and there is no calibration, then a run time error will occur.

Position results

Defining a TOOL
